description_long: This is a large, multi-story factory building with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched roof, featuring extensive graffiti on the upper roof surface. The facade is characterized by rows of tall, industrial-style windows, many of which are broken or boarded up, and the exterior walls are constructed from aged, weathered masonry. The building has a prominent central section with a rounded, turret-like structure at the rear, adding architectural interest and suggesting a historical industrial function. The roof is partially damaged, with visible holes and missing tiles, and there are signs of neglect and decay throughout, including overgrown vegetation at the base. The ground level includes a small covered entrance or loading area, and the overall structure sits on a slightly raised, rectangular base. The setting and details evoke the appearance of an abandoned or derelict early 20th-century factory, possibly from a European urban environment.
description: A large, weathered masonry factory building with tall industrial windows, graffiti on the roof, and a rounded rear turret. The structure shows signs of decay and abandonment.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main facade, tall windows, graffiti on the roof, and a small covered entrance at ground level.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the long row of industrial windows, extensive graffiti on the roof, and the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear-left view featuring the rounded turret structure, damaged roof, and overgrown ground area.
description_view_3: Rear-right view displaying the back of the building, rounded turret, and more visible roof damage.
